name: ColorRamp
description: Swatch strip for one colour primitive ramp (accent, neutral). Swatches render via their custom properties, so they follow the runtime hue.

antiPatterns.scenario: Using ColorRamp to present semantic tokens
antiPatterns.reason: Ramps show raw scales; semantic tokens need name, value and description.

a11y: Swatches are aria-hidden; each step is labelled by its token step as text
